# Weekly Slide Prep — Ads & Partnerships

> **When**: Every Friday before EOD
> **Where**: Slide 19 of `00 - MASTER - superApp - Weekly Update.pptx`
> **Audience**: William + Digital Platform leadership (Mon product review)

---

## How to Use This Template

Every Friday, fill in the sections below. Copy the content into your slide. Your AI assistant can help draft this — just say "prep my Friday slide" and share any new data points from the week.

---

## 1. Headline KPI (top-left, big number)

Pick ONE metric that tells the story this week. Rotate based on what's most relevant.

```
[METRIC NAME]: [NUMBER] ([+/-X% WoW] or [vs. target])
```

**Metric rotation options:**
- Ad Revenue (weekly): `$X,XXX (+X% WoW)`
- eCPM (blended or by tier): `$X.XX (+X% WoW)`
- Partner Value Delivered (BI): `€X,XXX this period`
- Viewable Impressions: `X.XM (+X% WoW)`
- OVU / 1K EBU (when NSM tracking is live): `XXX.X (+X% MoM)`

**Rules:**
- Always include the delta (WoW, MoM, or vs. target)
- If the number is good, say so: "New high" / "Best since X"
- If the number is bad, own it: "Down X% — driven by [reason]"

---

## 2. Highlights (right side, 3-5 bullets)

These are your **wins, learnings, and decisions** from the week. Not status updates — outcomes.

**Format each bullet as:**
```
[WHAT HAPPENED] — [NUMBER or RESULT] — [SO WHAT / NEXT STEP]
```

**Good examples:**
- "Prebid experiment results ready — Moba outperforms Publift by +11-27% RPV across all tiers — recommending phased migration starting Tier 3"
- "Skin Vault live on top 300 profiles — monitoring CTR to Tradeit this week"
- "Logitech Branded Event analysis complete — 12K activations, 3.2K completions, 26% CR — sharing results with Commercial for renewal pitch"
- "Play Interstitial at risk — design dependency on Flo, meeting booked for 28 Mar"

**Bad examples (don't do this):**
- "Working on Prebid" (no outcome)
- "Had meetings about Skin Vault" (no result)
- "Continuing viewability work" (vague)

---

## 3. Initiative Table Updates (center table)

For each initiative row, update the **Status**, **Stage**, and **Update** columns.

**Update column rules:**
- Lead with the current state, not the goal
- Include a number if you have one
- Keep to 1-2 sentences max
- End with what happens next week

**Stage options:** `📝 Definition` → `🎨 Design` → `🚧 Develop` → `🚢 Deploy` → `🚀 Launched` → `🔍 Analyzed & Complete`

**Status options:** `💚 On Track` / `⚠️ At Risk` / `🚨 Off Track` / `🛑 On Hold`

**Template for each row's Update cell:**
```
[Current state in 1 sentence]. [What's next or what's blocking].
```

**Examples:**
- Prebid: "3-week experiment complete. Moba +12% RPV avg. Presenting results Wed, recommending phased migration."
- Play Interstitial: "Design phase — waiting on Flo review (28 Mar). At risk if design feedback delays past early April."
- Skin Vault: "Deployed to top 300 profiles. Monitoring CTR to Tradeit; first data expected Thu."

---

## 4. Team Capacity (bottom-right table)

Only update if team composition changes. Current: 1 PM, 1 PD, 1 EM, 2 BE, 2 FE = 7.

---

## Friday Checklist

- [ ] Pull latest KPI numbers (Retool / BigQuery / GAM)
- [ ] Pick headline metric for this week
- [ ] Write 3-5 highlight bullets with numbers
- [ ] Update each initiative row (Stage, Status, Update)
- [ ] Check: does every bullet have a number or concrete outcome?
- [ ] Check: would someone outside the team understand what we achieved?
- [ ] Update the PPTX slide
- [ ] Post summary to `#bet-ads-partnerships` (see Slack template)

---

## This Week's Content (w/c 16 March 2026)

> **Pre-filled by your AI assistant. Review, adjust numbers, paste into slide.**

### Headline KPI
```
Ad Revenue (Prebid Experiment): Moba $497.71 vs Publift $508.85
RPV: Moba wins all tiers after Publift 20% commission (+11.5% T1, +12.0% T2, +27.5% T3)
```

### Highlights
- **Prebid experiment results ready** — 3-week analysis complete, Moba outperforms Publift on RPV across all tiers after commission — presenting to stakeholders Wed, recommending phased Tier 3 → Tier 2 → Tier 1 migration
- **Skin Vault deployed** — live on top 300 CS2 profiles (50/50 split) with Tradeit integration — monitoring CTR and Steam API error rate this week
- **Peripherals live in India** — hardware scan collecting device data from 100% of Indian users — validating data quality and coverage before expanding to Tier 2
- **Play Interstitial at risk** — design phase depends on Flo review, meeting booked for 28 March — format change from ≤15s to ≤30s still needs documenting
- **Mystery Box & Logitech events wrapped** — both experiments analyzed and complete, results available for Commercial team

| Prebid Experimentation | 🚀 Launched | 💚 On Track | 3-week experiment complete. Moba +12% avg RPV vs Publift. Presenting Wed. |
| Skin Initiative | 🚢 Deploy | 💚 On Track | Live on 300 profiles. First CTR data expected Thu. |
| Peripherals Initiative | 🚢 Deploy | 💚 On Track | Collecting data from India 100%. Validating schema with Egor. |
| Play Interstitial | 🎨 Design | ⚠️ At Risk | Design review with Flo on 28 Mar. One-pager needs ≤30s update. |
| Viewability Optimisation | 🚧 Develop | 🚨 Off Track | Blocked on implementation capacity. Needs reprioritisation discussion. |
| Retool Internal Data | 🚀 Launched | 💚 On Track | Live and in use. Iterating on NSM dashboard views. |
| Advertiser Portal v2 | 🚧 Develop | 💚 On Track | Development ongoing. No blockers. |
